quests.title: Back to Earth
quests.goalText: Bring Zodiac Recommendation Token to BlackSmith at the entrance to the village.
quests.briefText: To protect mortal world, Jade Emperor decreeds to choose 12 animals on earth to be Zodiac Envoys. Thus all creatures on earth are getting ready for a fight to became the chosen.Apollo descends to the world to find candidates. The road ahead is tortuous. You have to make great efforts to became one of the envoys. Please take the Zodiac Recommendation to find Blacksmith. Blacksmith is now at the entrance to the village.

--Back to Earth(1), Apollo, Lvl.1

General Lee had to send someone to find Fiend of Plague for details of the plague. Fiend of Plague is living in Dragon Palace .Go to Dragon Palace to find him.

quests.title: Ghost Hunting
quests.briefText:
God of Kitchen is sent by Jade Emperor to mortal world to arrest 3 ghouls fleed from Hell. The child being hustled away last night is one of the 3 ghouls --  Soul Absorber. Among the 3 ghouls, Soul Absorber is the weakest one. It is not difficult to defeat him, but it's not easy to tempt him out. Soul Absorber has learned Underground Flee Skill and I believe you have gone through his power. To tempt Soul Absorber out, you need to find his memery in hell. For capture of Soul Absorber, Soul Judge will not give you a hard time.

quests.title: Quest 88
quests.briefText: Your immediate concern is getting back your soul to insure you not to become a wandering soul. Your lost soul will be captured to Hell by Evilelf for judgment. Once the judgment is completed, it's unlikely to get it back. Monkey King took his soul back from Soul Judge. It's much better in case that you can save you soul out when the soul is on his way to hell. You have no chance to get your soul back if Hades hold it. Triumph Path is the only way to Hell. The entrance of the Hell is on the land there.

quests.title: Stele in the Lake
quests.briefText: Demon of Doom had been guarding the Doom Stone faithfully for a long time. The Doom Stone would active periodically, which was called the Doomsday. Jade Emperor has attempted to destroy the Stone for several times, But the Demon of Doom defeated him and the beasts and devils who approach the Stone became the slaves of the Demon. You will have the same result if you get close to it. The amour is prepared for you.
